Powered by Gemini 1.5 Pro

Understand any codebase
in seconds

CodeSonar uses advanced AI to analyze repositories, visualize architecture, and explain complex logic instantly.

Deep Analysis

Get comprehensive breakdowns of logic and flow.

Visual Architecture

Auto-generated UML and architecture diagrams.

Security & Quality

Identify bugs and vulnerabilities automatically.

Why CodeSonar?

Leveraging the power of Google Gemini to provide deep, actionable insights into your codebase.
